ValidationRule.description: Only users with the Chief Commercial Officer role or System Administrator profile can check the CCO Approved box.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISNEW(), ISCHANGED(CCO_Approved__c) ), CCO_Approved__c = true, $UserRole.Name <> 'Chief Commercial Officer', $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator' )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Only the Chief Commercial Officer can approve events with a Quoted Price above 1,500,000 EGP.
